data.raceName: PREH WE WIN RACING 5TH GRADE HT6
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. NO POWER is a capable type and proved too strong last time to win by 3.5 lengths at this track in a handy 22.11 beating Mad Attitude. Won at his only start from this box. Hard to go past. 8. CHEAP REALITY is progressing well claiming her 2nd career win latest, scoring by 6 lengths (21.82) at this track. Was a winner at her only start from this draw. Has hit winning form and can go on with it. 2. MENDOCINO turned spotting a big start finishing fourth (22.25) last time in a Grade 4/5 at this track. Key player if finds best. 3. HARRY BOY can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.","runners":[1,8,2,3],"exclusive":false}
